description_long: This cafe features a rectangular structure with a prominent orange-and-white striped awning running along its length, providing shade to the front-facing windows and entrance. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of brick and dark paneling, giving it a modern yet cozy appearance. Large glass windows dominate the front facade, allowing visibility into the interior seating area, while the side and rear walls are more enclosed with minimal fenestration. The entrance is accessible via a small set of steps and a metal railing, and there are potted plants adding a touch of greenery near the door. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the building, complementing the awning and providing additional shelter. Decorative round windows and subtle industrial accents complete the look, making it a welcoming spot in an urban environment.
description: A modern cafe with a striped orange awning, large front windows, brick and dark paneling, and a flat roof with industrial accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped awning, large glass windows, main entrance, and some greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the entrance steps, metal railing, and round decorative windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with brick cladding, minimal windows, and the awning extending along the length.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, limited openings, and the flat roof visible.
